subcodes.first_line: Concerning the realm after death whereof thou didst inquire, that world cannot be conceived or expressed in terms of this visible realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص عالم بعد از موت سؤال نموده بوديد ، آن عالم بتصوّر و عبارات اين عالم مشهود و معلوم نگردد
subcodes.subjects: @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
